name: Howard Karten's Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the tomatoes and remove their seeds.
2. Chop the tomato flesh into a moderately fine consistency and add it to a large saucepan.
3. Add the remaining ingredients to the saucepan and mix thoroughly.
4. Refrigerate the salsa until ready to serve.
"You can add any kind of vegetable you want to this."
